creator: robert.ayrapetyan@gmail.com
text:
After upgrading to 12.0, running:

x11vnc -ssl whatever...

ends with:

08/01/2019 16:32:15 Read initial data from X display into framebuffer.
08/01/2019 16:32:15 initialize_screen: fb_depth/fb_bpp/fb_Bpl 24/32/7680
08/01/2019 16:32:15 ** openssl_init: not compiled with libssl OpenSSL support **

Without -ssl option it works fine.
